description_long: This is a rectangular, single-basin kitchen or utility sink with a modern, minimalist design. The sink features a deep, boxy basin on one side and an integrated draining board on the other, both crafted from what appears to be stainless steel. A tall, curved faucet is mounted above the basin, with a single lever handle for water control. The edges of the sink are flat and wide, suitable for drop-in installation on a countertop. The surface is smooth and metallic, with a subtle sheen typical of brushed or polished steel. The drain is positioned at the rear of the basin, and no overflow hole is visible.
description: A modern, single-basin stainless steel sink with an integrated draining board and a tall, curved faucet. The design is sleek and functional, with a smooth metallic finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the deep basin on the right, the flat draining board on the left, and the faucet centrally positioned.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the square basin, faucet, and the width of the draining board.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the basin on the left and draining board on the right, faucet visible above the basin.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the faucet and the depth of the basin beneath the draining board.
